title: Property Consultant - Prestige Estates - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Prestige Estates - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
We at Prestige Estates are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Prestige Estates:
Prestige Estates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Prestige Estates!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
